g.text: RAG Component Cost vs Latency Tradeoffs

div.p: text-embedding-3-small Latency: ~15ms Cost: $0.02 / 1M tokens Dims: 1536 Fast and cheap
text-embedding-3-large Latency: ~30ms Cost: $0.13 / 1M tokens Dims: 3072 Higher accuracy, 6.5x cost
Cohere embed-v3 Latency: ~20ms Cost: $0.10 / 1M tokens Dims: 1024 Multilingual, good accuracy
pgvector Latency: ~50ms (p95) Cost: Free (self-hosted) Scale: ~1M vectors Use existing Postgres
Pinecone Latency: ~20ms (p95) Cost: $70/mo (s1.x1) Scale: ~5M vectors Managed, fastest
Weaviate Latency: ~30ms (p95) Cost: Free (self-hosted) Scale: ~10M vectors Hybrid search built-in
GPT-4o-mini Latency: ~300ms TTFT Cost: $0.15 / 1M input Output: $0.60 / 1M Best value for RAG
GPT-4o Latency: ~500ms TTFT Cost: $2.50 / 1M input Output: $10.00 / 1M Highest reasoning quality
Claude 3.5 Sonnet Latency: ~400ms TTFT Cost: $3.00 / 1M input Output: $15.00 / 1M Best long-context handling

text.tspan: Per-Query Cost Estimate (1K token query, top-5 retrieval)
